InventoryItemUIData.ItemName: Plans: Stone and Planks. Base set.
InventoryItemUIData.ItemDescription:
Learning this plan unlocks:
Basic Stone and Plank building elements.
- Stone Foundation (1 bit)
- Stone Block (1 bit)
- Plank Floor (2 bits)
- Triangular Plank Floor (1 bit)
- Stone and Plank Walls (4 bits)
- Triangular Plank Walls 45° (2 bits)
- Plank Wall Panels (2 bits)
- Stone and Timber Wall Panels (2 bits)
- Plank Stairs (1 bit)
- Plank Ramp (1 bit)
- Corner Stone Stairs (2 bits)
- Plank Window (2 bit)
- Plank Door (2 bit)
- Timber Pillars (1 bits)
- Timber Horizontal Beams (1 bits)

Part of the Old World building set.
